page_content:
PERS104 Beginning Persian II (3 Credits)

Continuation of PERS103 with sustained emphasis on the simultaneous development of structural and communicative competence in Persian. Prerequisite: PERS103; or must have appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score.

Restriction: Must not be a native/fluent speaker of Persian. Native/fluent speakers of Persian or students who have previously attended school in Persian speaking countries should take the World Language Placement and see the Persian Program Advisor to identify the correct Persian course for which to register.

Credit Only Granted for. PERS102 or PERS104.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
